rationale: The cited paper’s constructs (need-driven motivated judgment and hunger-related size/weight estimation) plausibly overlap with the citing paper’s energy-estimation and food-intake mechanisms. However, the available linkage is only a DOI-level reference match (ref index 21) with no citation-context text, and the citing note does not explicitly indicate reliance on ownership/wish-vs-worry theory. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
